nodes.title: Model links for Z-Image Turbo
widgets_values:
## Model links (when running locally)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)


**diffusion_models**

- [z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors)


**vae**

- [ae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors)


**upscale_model**

- [4x-UltraSharp.pth](https://huggingface.co/lokCX/4x-Ultrasharp/blob/main/4x-UltraSharp.pth)

Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│   │      └── ae.safetensors
│   └── 📂 upscale_models/
│          └── 4x-UltraSharp.pth
```

nodes.title: Read me!
widgets_values:
Load an image, hit run and be surprised by a new loop each time!

This is an hybrid workflow. It is using local video models and LLM API nodes.

You can use Z-Image LoRAs in the Z-Image Subgraphs.

You can bypass the save frames and save videos groups to only output the final combined video.

Enjoy,
Julien | MJM

nodes.title: Load Upscale Model - For Z-Image Turbo
Note: Model Links for Wan 2.2
widgets_values:
## Model links (when running locally)

**text_encoders**

- [umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors)

**loras**

- [wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_low_noise.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/loras/wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_low_noise.safetensors)
- [wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_high_noise.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/loras/wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_high_noise.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors)
- [wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**vae**

- [wan_2.1_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/vae/wan_2.1_vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │      ├── wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_low_noise.safetensors
│   │      └── wan2.2_i2v_lightx2v_4steps_lora_v1_high_noise.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      ├── wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   │      └── wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── wan_2.1_vae.safetensors
```

write 5 prompts based on this image, I will use these in a text 2 image model. The prompts should be different, be creative. Only use the image as inspiration.

I want only the prompts and nothing else. Each prompt on its own line.

No empty lines in-between the prompts:
Prompt 1
Prompt 2
Prompt 3
Prompt 4
Prompt 5
Write a wild prompt for a video model that will take first and last frame. Maximize motion and go crazy. Give me the prompt and nothing else.
Write a wild prompt for a video model that will take first and last frame. Maximize motion and go crazy. Give me the prompt and nothing else.
Write a wild prompt for a video model that will take first and last frame. Maximize motion and go crazy. Give me the prompt and nothing else.
Write a wild prompt for a video model that will take first and last frame. Maximize motion and go crazy. Give me the prompt and nothing else.

subgraphs.name: Optimized First-Last-Frame to Video with Wan 2.2

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: 冰晶组成的小猫突然被惊醒，愤怒的它抬头，渐渐长出色彩毛发变成为一个巨兽，像发现危险一样呲牙，瞪大眼睛

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走
Write a wild prompt for a video model that will take first and last frame. Maximize motion and go crazy. Give me the prompt and nothing else.
